items.title: Installation is project-scoped
items.description: xian-commit installs Skills, policy, and hooks into one target Git repository and does not provide user-level or global installation.
items.rule: Every target project is installed, verified, and updated separately.

items.title: External hook ownership stays explicit
items.description: xian-commit does not automatically chain Husky or other core.hooksPath managers.
items.rule: Installer operations that require managed hooks fail fast when core.hooksPath is configured.
